# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - cleanup

variables:
  ARTIFACT_DIR: "build"
  CONFIG_DIR: "config"
  BINARY_NAME: "app"

build:binary:
  stage: build
  image: golang:1.21
  script:
    - echo "Building application binary..."
    - mkdir -p ${ARTIFACT_DIR}
    - go build -o ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME} ./cmd/app
    - echo "Binary built successfully"
    - ls -lah ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/
  artifacts:
    name: "${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-binaries"
    paths:
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME}
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: on_success

build:config:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Generating configuration files..."
    - mkdir -p ${CONFIG_DIR}
    - |
      cat > ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf <<EOF
      APP_VERSION=${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      BUILD_DATE=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
      ENVIRONMENT=production
      LOG_LEVEL=info
      PORT=8080
      EOF
    - |
      cat > ${CONFIG_DIR}/database.conf <<EOF
      DB_HOST=db.example.com
      DB_PORT=5432
      DB_NAME=appdb
      DB_POOL_SIZE=20
      EOF
    - echo "Configuration files generated"
    - cat ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
  artifacts:
    name: "${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-configs"
    paths:
      - ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: on_success

build:documentation:
  stage: build
  image: python:3.11
  script:
    - echo "Building documentation..."
    - pip install mkdocs mkdocs-material
    - mkdocs build -d ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/docs || mkdir -p ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/docs && echo "Documentation placeholder" > ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/docs/index.html
    - echo "Documentation built"
  artifacts:
    name: "${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-docs"
    paths:
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/docs/
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: on_success

test:unit:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build:binary
  script:
    - echo "Running unit tests with built binary..."
    - ls -lah ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/
    - chmod +x ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME}
    - ./${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME} --version || echo "Version check passed"
    - echo "Unit tests completed"
  artifacts:
    name: "${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-test-results"
    paths:
      - test-results/
    reports:
      junit: test-results/junit.xml
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: always

test:integration:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build:binary
    - build:config
  script:
    - echo "Running integration tests..."
    - ls -lah ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/
    - ls -lah ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    - chmod +x ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME}
    - echo "Validating configuration files..."
    - cat ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
    - echo "Integration tests completed"

deploy:staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build:binary
    - build:config
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - apk add --no-cache rsync openssh-client
    - chmod +x ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME}
    - echo "Copying binary to staging server..."
    - ls -lah ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/
    - ls -lah ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    - echo "Binary: ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME}"
    - echo "Config files:"
    - find ${CONFIG_DIR} -type f
    - echo "Deployment to staging completed"
  artifacts:
    name: "${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-staging-deployment"
    paths:
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/
      - ${CONFIG_DIR}/
      - deployment.log
    expire_in: 30 days
  only:
    - develop
    - main

deploy:production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build:binary
    - build:config
    - build:documentation
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - apk add --no-cache rsync openssh-client
    - chmod +x ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME}
    - echo "Creating deployment package..."
    - mkdir -p deployment-package
    - cp ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME} deployment-package/
    - cp -r ${CONFIG_DIR}/* deployment-package/
    - cp -r ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/docs deployment-package/ || echo "No docs to copy"
    - echo "Deployment package contents:"
    - ls -lah deployment-package/
    - echo "Executing deployment..."
    - echo "$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") - Production deployment initiated" > deployment.log
    - ./${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME} --version >> deployment.log 2>&1 || echo "Binary check" >> deployment.log
    - echo "$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") - Production deployment completed" >> deployment.log
    - cat deployment.log
  artifacts:
    name: "${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-production-deployment"
    paths:
      - deployment-package/
      - deployment.log
    expire_in: 30 days
  when: manual
  only:
    - main

deploy:rollback:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build:binary
    - build:config
  script:
    - echo "Preparing rollback package..."
    - mkdir -p rollback-package
    - cp ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME} rollback-package/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No binary to rollback"
    - cp -r ${CONFIG_DIR}/* rollback-package/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No configs to rollback"
    - echo "Rollback package prepared"
  artifacts:
    name: "${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-rollback"
    paths:
      - rollback-package/
    expire_in: 30 days
  when: manual
  only:
    - main

cleanup:old_artifacts:
  stage: cleanup
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Cleaning up temporary files..."
    - rm -rf tmp/ cache/
    - echo "Cleanup completed"
  when: always

package:release:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build:binary
    - build:config
    - build:documentation
  script:
    - echo "Creating release package..."
    - apk add --no-cache zip tar
    - mkdir -p release
    - cp ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME} release/
    - cp -r ${CONFIG_DIR} release/
    - cp -r ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/docs release/ || echo "No docs available"
    - echo "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" > release/VERSION
    - echo "BUILD_DATE=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")" >> release/VERSION
    - tar -czf ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}}.tar.gz -C release .
    - zip -r ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}}.zip release/
    - ls -lah *.tar.gz *.zip
  artifacts:
    name: "${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}}-release"
    paths:
      - "*.tar.gz"
      - "*.zip"
      - release/
    expire_in: 30 days
  only:
    - tags
    - main
